message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class PatientStudioDriver <<C>> #white
class PatientAdapter <<C>> #white {
  interviews
}
note top of PatientAdapter
<<Proxy>>
end note

class InterviewStudioDriver <<C>> #white {
  save(study, patient, interview)
}

class StudyStudioDriver <<C>> #white
class StudyAdapter <<C>> #white {
  start(command, ...args)
  getInterviewItems(pageSet)
  apply(interviewItems)
}
note top of StudyAdapter
<<Proxy>>
end note

interface IMutationCommand <<I>> #white
class UpdateItemCommand <<C>> #white {
  start(study, page, index)
  getInterviewItems(pageSet)
  apply(study, interviewItems)
}

PatientStudioDriver --> PatientAdapter
StudyStudioDriver --> StudyAdapter

PatientAdapter ..> StudyAdapter : getInterviewItems(pageSet)
InterviewStudioDriver ..> StudyAdapter : apply(interviewItems)

StudyAdapter ..> UpdateItemCommand : start(...)
StudyAdapter ..> UpdateItemCommand : apply(...)

UpdateItemCommand ..|> IMutationCommand
@enduml
